name: Super-heavy Walker
community_notes: community-authored from 10e source (provisional 11e); see #21. Battle-shock outcome encoded as an ability-grant stand-in (no status-apply node yet); movement permissions are inert in the damage buff layer.

name: Rain of Devastation
community_notes: terrain-area target qualifier carried as prose; no target-in-terrain condition node, gated on shooting phase

name: Archeotech Autoloaders
community_notes: re-roll the dice that determine weapon Attacks characteristic (random A); encoded as re-roll all-failures over a weapon-attacks roll

name: Foebreaker Firestorm
community_notes: BLAST removal from the unit's [BLAST] ranged attacks carried as prose; modeled buff is +1 A

name: Driven from Their Lairs
community_notes: applies while the ARMIGER unit is affected by a Bondsman ability; bondsman gating carried as prose

name: Ancestral Overbleed
community_notes: -1 CP when targeting bearer with Fire Overwatch/Heroic Intervention stratagem

name: Honoured to Serve
community_notes: shooting does not prevent the ARMIGER unit from being eligible to start an action

name: Mysterious Guardian
community_notes: grants Deep Strike; once-per-battle redeploy (remove and set up >9" away) carried as prose

name: Noble Sacrifice
community_notes: Deadly Demise triggers on 4+ (Armiger adds 1 to the result) instead of only 6; threshold lowered to 4

name: Point-blank Barrage
community_notes: Blast weapons may target units in Engagement Range and ignore the engaged hit penalty; self-inflicted MW on unmodified 1 carried as prose

name: Strength from Exile
community_notes: applies only if no other friendly units are within 9"; isolation condition carried as prose

name: Survivor of Strife
community_notes: -1 to Wound only when attack Strength exceeds the unit's Toughness; S>T gate carried as prose

name: Full Tilt
community_notes: on Advance, no Advance roll; +6" M (or +9" if Armiger/Destrier). Armiger variant carried as prose
